flags: identical deliverable across distinct probes (possible canned output)
Deliverable is a JSON string containing serialized category objects, not a clean JSON object as might be expected
Word count rule incorrectly reports 0 words despite bodyText being provided in the test request
Some rules (e.g., img-alt) pass with 'no images' rather than checking actual images from the page

Some rules (e.g., img-alt) are scored as passed with a message that contradicts the rule intent
Categories array contains stringified JSON objects instead of native objects
